sub_groupings.name: Biliary Tract Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions affecting the structure and function of the biliary tract including ducts, gallbladder, and related structures

sub_groupings.name: Liver Neoplasms and Tumors
sub_groupings.description: Benign and malignant neoplastic conditions affecting the liver and/or biliary system

sub_groupings.name: Cholestatic Liver Diseases
sub_groupings.description: Conditions characterized by impaired bile flow leading to jaundice and cholestasis

sub_groupings.name: Congenital Hepatobiliary Conditions
sub_groupings.description: Developmental abnormalities present from birth affecting liver and biliary system

sub_groupings.name: Inflammatory and Infectious Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Conditions involving infection or inflammation of hepatobiliary structures

sub_groupings.name: Post-Procedural Hepatobiliary Complications
sub_groupings.description: Complications arising from medical procedures involving hepatobiliary system

sub_groupings.name: Metabolic and Drug-Related Liver Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Liver conditions caused by metabolic factors or medication effects

sub_groupings.name: Other Hepatobiliary Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous hepatobiliary conditions not fitting other categories
